Custom T2 Linux Build

Welcome to custom to T2 Linux github repo build by Orlovsky Consulting GbR

by Orl ConsultancyJuly 19, 2026

CUSTOM T2 LINUX BUILD BY ORLOVSKY CONSULTING GbR

We are not official T2 Linux developers, we build our own custom version of T2 Linux based on official repo of T2 Linux!

Read our code of ethics

Custom configs and examples for T2 Linux , build target X86_64 AMD CPU platform.

Here we gather all our custom configs and or iso’s which we have created during the building of custom t2 linux image

Feel free and contact us via ELEMENT or SLACK or via Forum or via FACEBOOK

This is template for so called base distribution without x server! (Hint: Linux server)

Please notice we use our own version of build and mkinitrd and build_initrd scripts, you need definetly to apply it , if you wish to try our template of custom T2 Linux!

Read our extensive WIKI

ALL LATEST ISO FOR DOWNLOAD ONLY IN ISO BRANCH!

IMPORTANT! READ RELEASE NOTES!
